Package nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper

Class AbstractReportGenerator

java.lang.Object
nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.AbstractReportGenerator
All Implemented Interfaces:
ReportContextAware
Direct Known Subclasses:
AbstractReportGenerator, ASSET_DTL_5aJasperGenerator, ASSET_DTL_5cJasperGenerator, BALANCE_3JasperGenerator, BundledTemplateJasperGenerator, COMMENTSJasperGenerator, CONTACT_INFO_1JasperGenerator, ContentsJasperGenerator, DEPR_DTL_8bJasperGenerator, DEPR_DTL_8cJasperGenerator, DEPR_DTL_8JasperGenerator, EXPENSE_DTL_12aJasperGenerator, EXPENSE_DTL_12bJasperGenerator, FINANCE_COMM_13JasperGenerator, FreeFormJasperGenerator, FUNDS_14JasperGenerator, INCOME_4JasperGenerator, INCOME_DTL_11aJasperGenerator, INCOME_DTL_11bJasperGenerator, INCOME_DTL_11cJasperGenerator, INVENTORY_DTL_6bJasperGenerator, INVENTORY_DTL_6JasperGenerator, LIABILITY_DTL_5bJasperGenerator, LIABILITY_DTL_5dJasperGenerator, NEWSLETTER_15JasperGenerator, PRIMARY_ACCOUNT_2aJasperGenerator, REGALIA_SALES_DTL_7bJasperGenerator, REGALIA_SALES_DTL_7JasperGenerator, SECONDARY_ACCOUNTS_2bJasperGenerator, SECONDARY_ACCOUNTS_2cJasperGenerator, SECONDARY_ACCOUNTS_2dJasperGenerator, TRANSFER_IN_9bJasperGenerator, TRANSFER_IN_9cJasperGenerator, TRANSFER_IN_9dJasperGenerator, TRANSFER_IN_9JasperGenerator, TRANSFER_OUT_10bJasperGenerator, TRANSFER_OUT_10cJasperGenerator, TRANSFER_OUT_10dJasperGenerator, TRANSFER_OUT_10JasperGenerator, UNDEPOSITED_FUNDSJasperGenerator
public abstract class AbstractReportGenerator extends Object implements ReportContextAware
Base class for Jasper report generators.

  • Method Details

    • getReportData

      protected abstract List<?> getReportData()
      Subclasses provide the data beans needed for the report.
      Returns:
      the report data

    • getReportParameters

      protected abstract Map<String,Object> getReportParameters()
      Subclasses provide any report parameters for the template.
      Returns:
      the report parameters

    • getReportPath

      protected abstract String getReportPath() throws ActionCancelledException, NoFileCreatedException
      Subclasses provide the JRXML path for the report.
      Returns:
      the report path
      Throws:
      ActionCancelledException - the action cancelled exception
      NoFileCreatedException - the no file created exception

    • getBaseName

      public abstract String getBaseName()
      Base name used when writing output files.
      Returns:
      the base name

    • generatePrint

      public net.sf.jasperreports.engine.JasperPrint generatePrint() throws net.sf.jasperreports.engine.JRException
      Builds the JasperPrint using the JRXML template, parameters, and bean data supplied by the generator.
      Returns:
      rendered JasperPrint
      Throws:
      net.sf.jasperreports.engine.JRException - if Jasper fails to compile or fill the template

    • writeJasperOutput

      public File writeJasperOutput(String format, net.sf.jasperreports.engine.JasperPrint print, String baseName) throws net.sf.jasperreports.engine.JRException, IOException
      Export the provided JasperPrint to disk.
      Parameters:
      format - output format ("pdf", "html", or "xlsx")
      print - rendered JasperPrint
      baseName - base output filename
      Returns:
      the generated file
      Throws:
      net.sf.jasperreports.engine.JRException - when Jasper export fails
      IOException - when file operations fail

    • getOutputDirectory

      protected File getOutputDirectory()
      Resolve the output directory for generated reports.
      Returns:
      directory to write report exports

    • setReportData

      public void setReportData(List<?> reportData)
      Allows callers to provide report data directly rather than generating it through getReportData().
      Parameters:
      reportData - the new report data

    • resolveReportData

      protected List<?> resolveReportData()
      Resolve the effective report data, preferring explicitly supplied beans.
      Returns:
      the list

    • getResolvedReportData

      public List<?> getResolvedReportData()
      Exposes resolved report data for non-Jasper export paths (e.g. XLSX templates).
      Returns:
      resolved report data list

    • setReportContext

      public void setReportContext(ReportContext context)
      Override @see nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.runtime.ReportContextAware#setReportContext(nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.runtime.ReportContext)

      setReportContext in interface ReportContextAware
      Parameters:
      context - the new report context

    • getReportContext

      protected ReportContext getReportContext()
      Gets the report context.
      Returns:
      the report context

    • isSingleBeanReport

      protected boolean isSingleBeanReport()
      Indicates whether this report should be driven by a single bean that represents the entire report output.
      Returns:
      true when the report should render once per bean

    • bundledReportPath

      protected String bundledReportPath()
      Convenience helper for templates packaged alongside metadata bundles.

      the string
